title: MailerLite vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: MailerLite vs Flodesk: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool for your needs.
intro: Choosing between MailerLite and Flodesk comes down to your specific use case. Both are legitimate email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. MailerLite is built for small businesses and freelancers on a budget, while Flodesk targets visual brands, photographers, and designers. This comparison covers the key differences so you can decide quickly.

comparison_table.tool_a: Small Businesses And Freelancers On A Budget

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses and freelancers on a budget
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on visual brands, photographers, and designers

faq.a: It depends on your use case. MailerLite wins for small businesses and freelancers on a budget, while Flodesk is stronger for visual brands, photographers, and designers. Neither is objectively better — the right choice depends on your specific needs.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, MailerLite or Flodesk?
faq.a: MailerLite starts at a lower price point ($9/mo vs $38/mo). However, pricing scales with subscriber count, so the total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to MailerLite?
faq.a: Yes, switching from Flodesk to MailerLite is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export for subscriber lists. Plan for some time to recreate automations and templates, as these rarely transfer directly between platforms.
